scripts.build: npm run build -w @pymebot/adapters && npm run build -w @pymebot/agents && npm run db:generate -w @pymebot/db && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @pymebot/core && npm run test -w @pymebot/agents && npm run test -w web
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
